'''ât-l-r-ch''' ('''katalrechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:anthropize|anthropize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-l-r-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:anthropize|anthropize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-l-r-ch
|-
! Lemma
| katalrechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitalrechoko|thitalrechoko]] || [[word:jitalrechoko|jitalrechoko]] || [[word:shitalrechoko|shitalrechoko]] || [[word:kitalrechoko|kitalrechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutalrechoko|thuthutalrechoko]] || [[word:jujutalrechoko|jujutalrechoko]] || [[word:shushutalrechoko|shushutalrechoko]] || [[word:kukutalrechoko|kukutalrechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutalrechoko|thutalrechoko]] || [[word:jutalrechoko|jutalrechoko]] || [[word:shutalrechoko|shutalrechoko]] || [[word:kutalrechoko|kutalrechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutalrechoko|thutalrechoko]] || [[word:jutalrechoko|jutalrechoko]] || [[word:shutalrechoko|shutalrechoko]] || [[word:kutalrechoko|kutalrechoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotalrechoko|thotalrechoko]] || [[word:jotalrechoko|jotalrechoko]] || [[word:shotalrechoko|shotalrechoko]] || [[word:kotalrechoko|kotalrechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotalrechoko|thotalrechoko]] || [[word:jotalrechoko|jotalrechoko]] || [[word:shotalrechoko|shotalrechoko]] || [[word:kotalrechoko|kotalrechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtalrechoko|thĂŠtalrechoko]] || [[word:jĂŠtalrechoko|jĂŠtalrechoko]] || [[word:shĂŠtalrechoko|shĂŠtalrechoko]] || [[word:kĂŠtalrechoko|kĂŠtalrechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatalrechoko|thathatalrechoko]] || [[word:jajatalrechoko|jajatalrechoko]] || [[word:shashatalrechoko|shashatalrechoko]] || [[word:kakatalrechoko|kakatalrechoko]]
|-

|-

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
